hooks.command: [[ "${NO_NOTIFY:-}" == "1" ]] && exec cat > /dev/null; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "SessionStart"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @-

[[ "${NO_NOTIFY:-}" == "1" ]] && exec cat > /dev/null; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "UserPromptSubmit"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @-

[[ "${NO_NOTIFY:-}" == "1" ]] && exec cat > /dev/null; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "PreToolUse"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @-

[[ "${NO_NOTIFY:-}" == "1" ]] && exec cat > /dev/null; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "PermissionRequest"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @-

[[ "${NO_NOTIFY:-}" == "1" ]] && exec cat > /dev/null; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "Stop"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @-

[[ "${NO_NOTIFY:-}" == "1" ]] && exec cat > /dev/null; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "Notification"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @-

[[ "${NO_NOTIFY:-}" == "1" ]] && exec cat > /dev/null; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "PreCompact"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @-

[[ "${NO_NOTIFY:-}" == "1" ]] && exec cat > /dev/null; _d=$(jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "SessionEnd"}'); nohup curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_API_KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$_d" >/dev/null 2>&1 &
